description_wiki: India, officially the Republic of India, is a country in South Asia.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: California () is a state in the Western United States that lies on the Pacific Coast.
Microsoft Corporation is an American multinational technology company headquartered in Redmond, Washington.

description: ancient Indo-Aryan language of South Asia
description_wiki: Sanskrit (; stem form संस्कृत; nominal singular संस्कृतम्, saṃskṛtam,) is a classical language belonging to the Indo-Aryan branch of the Indo-European languages.

Arthur is an animated children's television series developed by Marc Brown and Kathy Waugh and produced by WGBH Boston for PBS. Based on Brown's Arthur book series, it is set in the fictional city of Elwood City and revolves around the lives of Arthur Read, an anthropomorphic aardvark, his friends and family, and their daily interactions with each other.

description: American children's television program, sometimes to teach ESL.
description_wiki: Sesame Street is an American educational children's television series that combines live-action, sketch comedy, animation, and puppetry.

description: American PBS children's programming brand since 1999
description_wiki: PBS Kids (stylized in all caps) formerly PTV is the branding used for nationally distributed children's programming carried by the U.S. public television network PBS. The brand encompasses a daytime block of children's programming carried daily by most PBS member stations, a 24-hour channel carried on the digital subchannels of PBS member stations (sometimes called the PBS Kids Channel or PBS Kids 24/7), and its accompanying digital platforms.

description: soap operas written, produced, filmed in India, with characters played by Indians
Hindu, Jain, Sikh, Buddhist and South Asian festival of lights
description_wiki: Dipavali (IAST: Dīpāvalī), commonly known as Diwali (), is the Hindu festival of lights, with variations celebrated in other Indian religions such as Jainism and Sikhism.
"Jana Gana Mana" is the national anthem of the Republic of India.

description: public research university in Ann Arbor, Michigan
description_wiki: The University of Michigan (UMich, U-M, or Michigan) is a public research university in Ann Arbor, Michigan, United States.

description: ethnic group; Americans of Indian birth or descent
description_wiki: Indian Americans (Devanagari: भारतीय अमेरिकी, romanized: Bhāratīya Amerikan) are Americans whose ancestry originates wholly or partly from India.
